note: Measured benchmark ledger. Per machine, per milestone, Python/Warp prototype vs C++/CUDA native. Regenerate/extend when a milestone result changes or on a new machine. Feeds the comparison dashboard.

machines.note: reference box (2x RTX 2080 Ti); no bf16 tensor cores

milestones.name: wavelet access
milestones.compare: parity kernel-to-kernel; native adds the device-native API that removes the round-trip
milestones.caveat: user-facing path is transfer-bound; kernel is what counts in a serving loop

milestones.name: price of addressability
milestones.compare: raw gather is the floor; wavelet buys rank/search + large-vocab footprint
milestones.caveat: raw gather wins dense small-vocab uniform reads; sorted access halves the wavelet premium

milestones.name: wavelet rank + two-level directory
milestones.compare: native win is the directory redesign, not the language
milestones.caveat: directory 4x larger but only ~1.35x the total index; a per-deployment knob

milestones.name: RRR rank1 (entropy frontier)
milestones.compare: faithful port; combinatorial decode is nearly free
milestones.caveat: max-entropy planes are BIGGER under RRR (keep packed) - the BWT profile

milestones.name: fused decode + embedding gather
milestones.cpp: embedding gather: unfused wins at every dim (honest negative)
milestones.compare: opposite ideal thread mappings; tiny intermediate = no memory win here
milestones.caveat: fuse by how expensive the avoided intermediate is, not everything

prototype_headlines.result: window latency flat 1K->64K; 264x vs decode-all at 64K (Qwen2.5-1.5B); 8.9x VRAM
int4+class-Huffman ~1.33 b/w; SpQR outliers make int4 beat int8 accuracy at int8 size
int8 near-lossless; int4 needs group-128 AND int8 embedding (mixed precision)
10.6x less VRAM held during compute (Warp PoC)
GPU suffix array 17-32x vs CPU, bit-identical
FM-index draft = 2.18x fewer gpt2 forward passes
real Qwen2.5 generation, coherent, compressed prefix
